# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

_format_version: "3.0"
_transform: true

services:
  - name: users-service
    protocol: http
    host: users-upstream
    port: 80
    path: /
    retries: 5
    connect_timeout: 5000
    write_timeout: 30000
    read_timeout: 30000
    tags: [prod, microservice]
    routes:
      - name: users-route
        protocols: [http, https]
        methods: [GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE, OPTIONS]
        paths: ["/v1/users", "/v1/users/"]
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false
        https_redirect_status_code: 426
        regex_priority: 10
        request_buffering: true
        response_buffering: true
        tags: [prod, v1]
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        enabled: true
        config:
          origins: ["https://app.example.com", "https://admin.example.com"]
          methods: ["GET", "POST", "PUT", "PATCH", "DELETE", "OPTIONS"]
          headers: ["Authorization", "Content-Type", "X-Request-Id", "X-Correlation-Id"]
          exposed_headers: ["X-Request-Id"]
          credentials: true
          max_age: 3600
      - name: rate-limiting
        enabled: true
        config:
          minute: 600
          hour: 10000
          policy: redis
          redis_host: redis.example.internal
          redis_port: 6379
          redis_timeout: 2000
          redis_database: 0
          fault_tolerant: true
          hide_client_headers: false
      - name: request-id
        enabled: true
        config:
          header_name: X-Request-Id
          echo_downstream: true
      - name: prometheus
        enabled: true
        config:
          status_code_metrics: true
          latency_metrics: true
          bandwidth_metrics: true
          upstream_health_metrics: true
      - name: http-log
        enabled: true
        config:
          http_endpoint: "https://logs.example.com/kong"
          method: POST
          timeout: 1000
          keepalive: 60000
          queue:
            max_batch_size: 50
            max_entries: 10000
            max_bytes: 10485760
            max_retry_time: 60
            initial_retry_delay: 0.01
            max_retry_delay: 60
            max_coalescing_delay: 1
      - name: bot-detection
        enabled: true
        config:
          deny:
            - "curl"
            - "python-requests"
            - "wget"
      - name: request-transformer
        enabled: true
        config:
          add:
            headers:
              - "X-Forwarded-Proto:$(scheme)"
          append:
            headers:
              - "X-Request-Start:$(timestamp)"

  - name: orders-service
    protocol: http
    host: orders-upstream
    port: 80
    path: /
    retries: 5
    connect_timeout: 5000
    write_timeout: 30000
    read_timeout: 30000
    tags: [prod, microservice]
    routes:
      - name: orders-route
        protocols: [http, https]
        methods: [GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE, OPTIONS]
        paths: ["/v1/orders", "/v1/orders/"]
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false
        https_redirect_status_code: 426
        regex_priority: 10
        request_buffering: true
        response_buffering: true
        tags: [prod, v1]
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        enabled: true
        config:
          minute: 300
          hour: 6000
          policy: redis
          redis_host: redis.example.internal
          redis_port: 6379
          redis_timeout: 2000
          redis_database: 0
          fault_tolerant: true
          hide_client_headers: false
      - name: request-id
        enabled: true
        config:
          header_name: X-Request-Id
          echo_downstream: true
      - name: prometheus
        enabled: true
        config:
          status_code_metrics: true
          latency_metrics: true
          bandwidth_metrics: true
          upstream_health_metrics: true
      - name: http-log
        enabled: true
        config:
          http_endpoint: "https://logs.example.com/kong"
          method: POST
          timeout: 1000
          keepalive: 60000
          queue:
            max_batch_size: 50
            max_entries: 10000
            max_bytes: 10485760
            max_retry_time: 60
            initial_retry_delay: 0.01
            max_retry_delay: 60
            max_coalescing_delay: 1

  - name: inventory-service
    protocol: http
    host: inventory-upstream
    port: 80
    path: /
    retries: 5
    connect_timeout: 5000
    write_timeout: 30000
    read_timeout: 30000
    tags: [prod, microservice]
    routes:
      - name: inventory-route
        protocols: [http, https]
        methods: [GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE, OPTIONS]
        paths: ["/v1/inventory", "/v1/inventory/"]
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false
        https_redirect_status_code: 426
        regex_priority: 10

        tags: [prod, v1]
    plugins:

  - name: payments-service
    protocol: http
    host: payments-upstream
    port: 80
    path: /
    retries: 5
    connect_timeout: 5000
    write_timeout: 30000
    read_timeout: 30000
    tags: [prod, microservice]
    routes:
      - name: payments-route
        protocols: [http, https]
        methods: [GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, DELETE, OPTIONS]
        paths: ["/v1/payments", "/v1/payments/"]
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false
        https_redirect_status_code: 426
        regex_priority: 10
        request_buffering: true
        response_buffering: true
        tags: [prod, v1]
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        enabled: true
        config:
          minute: 120
          hour: 2000
          policy: redis
          redis_host: redis.example.internal
          redis_port: 6379
          redis_timeout: 2000
          redis_database: 0
          fault_tolerant: true
          hide_client_headers: false
      - name: request-id
        enabled: true
        config:
          header_name: X-Request-Id
          echo_downstream: true
      - name: prometheus
        enabled: true
        config:
          status_code_metrics: true
          latency_metrics: true
          bandwidth_metrics: true
          upstream_health_metrics: true
      - name: http-log
        enabled: true
        config:
          http_endpoint: "https://logs.example.com/kong"
          method: POST
          timeout: 1000
          keepalive: 60000
          queue:

            max_entries: 10000
            max_bytes: 10485760
            max_retry_time: 60
            initial_retry_delay: 0.01
            max_retry_delay: 60
            max_coalescing_delay: 1

upstreams:
  - name: users-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 2
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          interval: 5
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          http_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
          tcp_failures: 3
      passive:
        healthy:
          successes: 5
        unhealthy:
          http_failures: 5
          timeouts: 5
          tcp_failures: 5
    tags: [prod, upstream]
    targets:
      - target: users-1.example.internal:8080
        weight: 100
      - target: users-2.example.internal:8080
        weight: 100

  - name: orders-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 2
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          interval: 5
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          http_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
          tcp_failures: 3
      passive:
        healthy:
          successes: 5
        unhealthy:
          http_failures: 5
          timeouts: 5
          tcp_failures: 5
    tags: [prod, upstream]
    targets:
      - target: orders-1.example.internal:8080
        weight: 100
      - target: orders-2.example.internal:8080
        weight: 100

  - name: inventory-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:

  - name: payments-upstream
    algorithm: round-robin
    slots: 10000
    healthchecks:
      active:
        type: http
        http_path: /health
        timeout: 2
        concurrency: 10
        healthy:
          interval: 5
          successes: 2
        unhealthy:
          interval: 5
          http_failures: 3
          timeouts: 3
          tcp_failures: 3
      passive:
        healthy:
          successes: 5
        unhealthy:
          http_failures: 5
          timeouts: 5
          tcp_failures: 5
    tags: [prod, upstream]
    targets:
      - target: payments-1.example.internal:8080
        weight: 100
      - target: payments-2.example.internal:8080
        weight: 100

plugins:
  - name: pre-function
    enabled: true
    config:
      access:
        - |
          local rid = kong.request.get_header("X-Request-Id")
          if not rid then
            kong.service.request.set_header("X-Request-Id", kong.request.get_header("X-Kong-Request-Id") or kong.request.get_header("Kong-Request-ID") or tostring(kong.uuid()))
          end
          local cid = kong.request.get_header("X-Correlation-Id")
          if not cid then
            kong.service.request.set_header("X-Correlation-Id", kong.request.get_header("X-Request-Id"))
          end
  - name: response-transformer
    enabled: true
    config:
      add:
        headers:
          - "Strict-Transport-Security:max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains; preload"
          - "X-Content-Type-Options:nosniff"
          - "X-Frame-Options:DENY"
          - "Referrer-Policy:no-referrer"
      remove:
        headers:
          - "Server"
          - "Via"

consumers:
  - username: internal-service
    custom_id: internal-service
    tags: [prod]
    keyauth_credentials:
      - key: "REPLACE_WITH_SECURE_INTERNAL_KEY"

  - username: partner-client
    custom_id: partner-client
    tags: [prod]
    keyauth_credentials:
      - key: "REPLACE_WITH_SECURE_PARTNER_KEY"

# Optional: add a separate admin/health route as needed for edge health checks
# If you want it, uncomment and point to a lightweight internal service
# services:
#   - name: gateway-health
#     url: http://127.0.0.1:8100/health
#     routes:
#       - name: gateway-health-route
#         paths: ["/healthz"]
#         strip_path: true

# Note: Enable authentication per-route/service as required (e.g., key-auth, jwt, oauth2).
# Example global key-auth (disabled by default):
# plugins:
#   - name: key-auth
#     enabled: true
#     config:
#       key_names: ["apikey"]
#       hide_credentials: true
